SessionStart.command: printf '{"continue": true, "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "Workflow pack available: use @planner, @implementation, @reviewer or prompt commands such as /start-feature-design. For durable handoff, persist design notes in docs/design/ and plans in docs/plans/."}}'
SessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output '{\"continue\": true, \"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"SessionStart\", \"additionalContext\": \"Workflow pack available: use @planner, @implementation, @reviewer or prompt commands such as /start-feature-design. For durable handoff, persist design notes in docs/design/ and plans in docs/plans/.\"}}'"
